basis: Conservative weighted parity completion model. Points count only when tied to repository evidence; blocked/unproven work scores 0 for that criterion.

criteria.description: Original/source reference inventory exists and is source-locked for this target.
Target-specific parity/completion matrix exists with clear acceptance labels.
Target launches or renders through a repeatable repo gate/smoke path.
Core input, movement/camera, command routing, and first viewport redraw path are source/runtime-gated.
Viewport, HUD, panels, title/menu, palette, graphics decode, and UI render surfaces are source/runtime-gated.
Combat, creatures, items, spells, sensors, projectiles, save/load, lifecycle, and dungeon systems are original/source-gated.
Audio content, trigger cadence, animation/timing, input responsiveness, and music/SFX overlap are original/source-gated.
Original runtime captures/overlays/regression gates prove pixel/behavior parity for representative states.

reference_inventory: DM1 PC 3.4 canonical anchors, ReDMCSB source and Greatstone references are present and repeatedly cited.
definition_matrix: docs/parity/PARITY_MATRIX_DM1_V1.md exists and carries DM1 V1 labels/status rows.
launch_smoke: M9/M10/M11 infrastructure and startup/menu/title gates exist, but current original route still has input/table blockers.
core_input_movement: pass296/pass299 plus pass372 source-lock Firestaff input/keypad route through C001..C006 command queue, movement timing/pipeline, and first viewport redraw; residual is original DOS keyboard-buffer transcript/overlay proof.
viewport_ui_render: Many source-backed UI/viewport/title/HUD/palette rows are MATCHED or narrowed; full pixel/content parity remains open.
gameplay_systems: Semantic suites exist but most gameplay rows remain UNPROVEN or need original-backed cases.
audio_timing: Audio assets/event mapping are partly source-backed; cadence/timing overlap remain blocked/unproven.
original_overlay_regression: Representative original runtime overlay parity is not yet proven; route/capture remains active blocker.

primaryBlockers: Original DOSBox/FIRES keyboard-buffer transcript for I34E route keys remains unclaimed, but no longer blocks Firestaff live route.
Representative original runtime movement/HUD/viewport overlay parity missing.

reference_inventory: DM1 source/original inventory applies; V2 remains original-required but not separately complete.
definition_matrix: dm1_v2_completion_matrix/status artifacts exist but explicitly do not prove completion.
launch_smoke: Some V2 shell/scaffold gates exist; full launcher/preview smoke is unproven.
core_input_movement: Movement/camera scaffolds exist; source-locked V2 semantics incomplete.
viewport_ui_render: Viewport/wall/upscale scaffolds exist; full V2 render/material/UI gates absent.
gameplay_systems: No complete V2 gameplay-system parity gates.
original_overlay_regression: No V2 representative original-overlay regression proof.

primaryBlockers: V2 completion audit says 100% is not verifiable; phases 1–6 remain absent/incomplete.
